template_name: California Stage-Gate Scaffold (v0.2 Draft, LAPM ID Pending Review)

gates.name: Initiation & Project Authorization
stip_rtip_mapping: Program intent captured with cycle metadata
ceqa_vmt_mapping: Initial project classification for CEQA transportation track
outreach_mapping: Outreach lead assignment and preliminary engagement strategy

gates.name: Agreements, Procurement, and Civil Rights Setup
ceqa_vmt_mapping: CEQA lead and method ownership assigned
outreach_mapping: Equity/access commitments and engagement roles confirmed

required_evidence.title: Consultant selection package (if consultant delivery path)
Invoicing controls and eligible cost protocol

gates.name: Environmental + CEQA VMT Method Gate
stip_rtip_mapping: Environmental readiness support for programming credibility

required_evidence.title: VMT method declaration and assumptions register
SHS induced-travel method note (conditional if SHS=true)

gates.name: Outreach + Public Hearing Documentation Gate
stip_rtip_mapping: Robust engagement evidence accumulation for RTIP/ITIP

gates.name: Planning-to-Programming (RTIP/STIP) Gate
ceqa_vmt_mapping: Scenario rationale and VMT implications traceable
outreach_mapping: Engagement outcomes tied to programming decisions

gates.name: Design/PS&E + ROW/Utilities + Cost Documentation Gate
ceqa_vmt_mapping: Method/assumption updates if design materially changes transportation effects
outreach_mapping: Material scope changes communicated and logged

gates.name: Advertise & Award Gate
ceqa_vmt_mapping: CEQA commitment continuity into procurement package

gates.name: Completion, Maintenance, Audit/Corrective Action Gate
stip_rtip_mapping: Closeout records support future programming cycles
ceqa_vmt_mapping: Final CEQA/VMT narrative archive with revision trail
outreach_mapping: Final outreach closeout and lessons-learned archive

required_evidence.title: Final invoicing and financial closeout package
